roa.docketEntryComment: AMENDED - Order on Motion to Vacate Conviction and/or Sentence
DEFT'S MOTION VACATING CONVICTION PURS PC1473,7 FILED
PPL NON OPP TO DEF MOT TO SET ASIDE PLEA & VACATE CONVCTN, FILED
NO APPEAR BY DEFT, JUDGE CHAITIN IS ILL
/CAL: TO SET AND PRESENTENCE REPORT/DOP//CONTD: NOVEMBER 3 2003 FOR SENTENCING/
CONT FOR STATUS AND PSR, DOP
CONT FOR STATUS AND PRE SENTENCE REPORT ON SEPT 4 2003, DOP
DEFT FOUND GUILTY BY JURY VERDICT, ALLEGATION 1 FOUND TO BE TRUE
BWI, DEFT LEFT, NO BAIL, RET TO S22

/CAL: MOTION TO VACATE PURSUANT TO WRIT OF ERROR CORAM NOBIS; DA NON- OPPOSITION TO SET ASIDE/NP/X:THIS HEARING IS NOT REPORTED/X: THE PEOPLE DO NOTOPPOSE PETITIONER'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE GUILTY FINDING BY JURY, ENTERA NOT GUILTY PLEA AND SET ASIDE THE  SENTENCE OF 02-10-04/MO GRTD/X: DEFENDANT FOUND GUILTY BY JURY ON:09-27-02/X: SENTENCE DATE:02-10-04/ /X: THECOURT FINDS DEFENDANT WAS NOT PROPERLY ADVISED OF THE POTENTIAL IMMIGRATIONCONSEQUENCES OF PROCEEDING TO TRIAL & THE POTENTIAL OF A GUILTY PLEA BEINGRETURNED BY JURY, /CTORD: THE CONVICTION AND SENTENCE WERE ILLEGAL AND INVALID, THE FAILURE OF COUNSEL TO ADVISE THE DEFENDANT ON POTENTIAL IMMIGRATION  CONSEQUERNCES OF GOING TO TRIAL DAMAGED THE DEFENDANT,  ACCORDINGLY,THE IMPOSED SENTENCE ON 02-10-04 IS SET ASIDE A NOT GUILTY  PLEA IS ENTERED, THE AFOREMENTIONED SENTENCE ENTERED IS HEREBY VACATED, /X: THERE BEINGNO NEW PLEA OS VERDICT ENTERED, THE COURT ORDERS THE  MATTER DISMISSED/MOPC 1385: INTEREST OF JUSTICE/X: ORDER SIGNED AND FILED/
/CAL:FOR PRETRIAL AND MOTION TO SUPPRESS//X:AFTER HEARING ARGUMENTS, MOTION TO SUPPRESS IS DENIED,/CONTD:TO BE HEARDWITH #2027707/CTORD: CASE PRETRIED AND TRIAL DATE CONFIRMED/
/CAL:FOR HEARING RE MOTION TO SUPPRESS//X:BODY ATTACHMENT ISSUED FOR SFPD OFFICER GABRIELA ROSALES, STAR #0230 BUTSTAYED UNTIL MAY 28, 2002,/CONT/
/TEXT:TRANS TO CIVIC CENTER COURT HOUSE/TRANS CC:FORTHWITH/
/TEXT:TRANS TO CIVIC CENTER COURT HOUSE//TRANS CC:FORTHWITH TO DEPARTMENT 206 FOR TRIAL ASSIGNMENT/
/X:CAUSE IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 22X, FORTHWITH; TO BE HEARD//X:BEFORE JUDGE DONALDSON, FOR PRETRIAL,/
/MO TO CONT:BY DISTRICT ATTORNEY PC 1050(G)/CAUSE/MO GRTD/WD GTW/TWWD:07-24-2002/CO:LAST DAY FOR TRIAL 09-23-2002/
